/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/cc  -fPIC -Wall -DGMT_NO_CURL -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.6 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/gmt.dir/gmt.c.o -o gmt  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/xuning/Work/go-dem/build5/external/gmt/src libgmt.6.7.0.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libnetcdf.dylib /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk/usr/lib/libcurl.tbd /Users/xuning/Work/go-dem/libs/darwin_arm/libgdal_c.a /Users/xuning/Work/go-dem/libs/darwin_arm/libgeos.a -framework Accelerate -lm -ldl -framework Accelerate -lm -ldl libpostscriptlight.6.7.0.dylib /Users/xuning/Work/go-dem/libs/darwin_arm/libzlib.a
